dependencies: Third-party suppliers of data including stock exchanges
Third-party vendors for distribution of products
Cloud providers and data center infrastructure
risks: Dependence on third parties to supply data, applications and services
Reliance on certain vendors to distribute products
Risk of exclusive contracts between competitors and data suppliers
Potential termination of data supply agreements on short notice
Cyber-attacks or security incidents affecting suppliers
Vulnerabilities in third-party software, systems or networks

regulatory_risks: EU Benchmark Regulation (EU BMR) and UK Benchmarks Regulation (UK BMR) requirements
ESMA Guidelines on ETFs and UCITS Issues disclosure requirements
Potential new benchmark regulations in India and South Africa
EU regulation requiring ESG ratings providers to become authorized and supervised by ESMA
ESG ratings and data provider regulations in UK, Japan, Hong Kong SAR, Taiwan, India and Singapore
Data privacy laws including GDPR and evolving global data protection requirements
European Union's Artificial Intelligence Act
Investment Advisers Act of 1940 compliance requirements
SEC proposed rule on outsourcing services by investment advisers
Potential classification of index providers as investment advisers
Anti-corruption laws including Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and UK Bribery Act 2010
Economic and trade sanctions compliance
Anti-boycott restrictions
Tariffs and customs duties
ERISA compliance requirements
China registration with Cyberspace Administration of China
SEBI registration in India as ESG Ratings Provider
Sustainability disclosure requirements and greenwashing prevention regulations
Country-by-country reporting and tax transparency initiatives
OECD BEPS Pillar 2 global minimum tax (15%)
Potential U.S. corporate tax rate increases
Anti-ESG legislation and regulatory scrutiny in certain U.S. jurisdictions

sanction_risks: U.S. Executive Order prohibiting transactions in securities of certain Chinese companies
Sanctions compliance requirements affecting index composition
Potential capital controls and exchange controls in foreign jurisdictions
Restrictions on cash transfers and currency conversion from non-U.S. subsidiaries
